delicious-pate-in-a-crust-very-crunchy-c.name: Delicious Fairy
delicious-pate-in-a-crust-very-crunchy-c.original_name: Delicioso paté en costra, muy crujiente

ingredients.item: 200 g bird's liver (chicken, duck or pork)
100 gr de carne de cerdo magra
1  huevo para el relleno y 1 huevo para barnizar
1 / 2 cdite of freshly ground black pepper
150 gr de masa hojaldrada o masa quebrada
1 cdote of fresh herbs (thyme, rosemary or stragon)
20 gr de pistachos o nueces picadas para textura (opcional)

instructions: Finger the liver and pork.
In a frying pan, golden onion and garlic into some butter till they are translucent.
Add meat and liver and briefly skip without cooking completely.
Incorporar brandy, hierbas, nuez moscada, sal y pimienta. Mezclar bien y dejar enfriar.
To purify the oven at 180 been 3 been.
Expand the mass onto a small mold, place the pilling at the centre and cover with the remaining mass, sealing the edges.
Batir un huevo y barnizar toda la superficie de la masa para lograr un dorado uniforme.
Do a small cut at the top to get the steam out.
Bake from 35 to 40 minutes till dough is golden and crispy.
Dejar reposar 10 minutos antes de cortar para que el relleno se asiente.

dianes-no-cook-red-hamburger-relish.name: Diane's No-cook Red Hamburger Relish

ingredients.item: Jarred roasted red peppers with garlic

instructions: Mix relish, tomato paste, roasted red peppers, vinegar, sugar, liquid smoke, black pepper, and cinnamon together in a bowl. Spoon mixture into a clean glass jar and screw the lid on tightly. Store in the refrigerator.

dill-pickles.name: Dill Pickles
instructions: Divide cucumbers and dill between jars. Bring vinegar, salt, sugar, peppercorns, caraway seeds, and 2 cups water to a boil in a small saucepan, stirring to dissolve salt and sugar. Pour hot brine into jars, dividing evenly, and cover. Let cool, then chill.
Do Ahead: Cucumbers can be pickled 2 months ahead. Keep chilled.

double-ginger-sour-cream-bundt-cake-with.name: Double-ginger Sour Cream Bundt Cake With Ginger-infused Strawberries
instructions: Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 177°C. Brush softened butter generously all over inside of 12-cup Bundt pan. Sprinkle raw sugar over butter in pan, tilting pan to coat completely.

Whisk flour, ground ginger, baking powder, and salt in medium bowl. Using electric mixer, beat 1 cup butter in large bowl until smooth. Add 2 cups sugar; beat on medium-high speed until blended, about 2 minutes. Add eggs 1 at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat in 1 egg yolk and vanilla, stopping to scrape down bowl as needed. Add flour mixture in 3 additions alternately with sour cream in 2 additions, beating on low speed just until blended after each addition. Mix in crystallized ginger. Spread batter in pan, being careful not to dislodge raw sugar.

Bake cake until top is light brown and tester inserted near center comes out with a few small crumbs attached, about 55 minutes. Transfer to rack; cool in pan 15 minutes. Gently tap bottom edge of pan on work surface while rotating pan until cake loosens. Place rack atop pan and invert cake onto rack; remove pan. Cool completely.

Combine first 4 ingredients in small saucepan. Bring to boil over medium-high heat, stirring until sugar dissolves. Boil until mixture is reduced to scant 1 cup, about 4 minutes. Remove from heat; cool ginger syrup to room temperature (do not strain). DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.
Place berries in medium bowl. Strain ginger syrup and pour over berries; toss. Cover and chill at least 1 hour. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Keep chilled.
Cut cake into slices and place on plates. Spoon berries with syrup alongside. Sprinkle with mint, if desired, and serve.

dry-rubbed-flank-steak-with-grilled-corn.name: Dry-rubbed Flank Steak With Grilled Corn Salsa
instructions: Combine brown sugar, chile powder, paprika, salt, pepper, cayenne, granulated garlic, mustard powder, coriander, and cumin in a small bowl.

Prepare a grill for medium-high heat; oil grate. Grill corn, turning occasionally, until lightly browned all over, 8–10 minutes; let cool. Cut kernels from cobs and place in a medium bowl. Add onion, jalapeño, tomatoes, cilantro, and lime juice to corn and toss to combine; season with salt and pepper. Set salsa aside.

Meanwhile, coat steak with all of dry rub, packing on more than once if needed, and drizzle with 2 Tbsp. oil to help rub adhere. Grill steak, turning occasionally and moving to a cooler spot on grill as needed to control flare-ups, until nicely browned and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part registers 130°, about 4 minutes per side for medium-rare. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest 10 minutes.
Return steak to grill just to recrisp exterior, about 1 minute per side. Transfer back to cutting board and slice against the grain. Serve topped with salsa.
Do Ahead: Salsa can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

duck-rice-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Duck Rice Recipe
instructions: Place the duck in a large pot, add 2 to 3 l of water and season with salt and pepper. Add the chicken broth cube, the onion with spiked cloves, the peeled carrot and the chorizos, take it to the fire and let it cook for about 45 minutes. Once cooked, remove the duck onto a platter and let it cool.
In a separate pot, light the duck’s cooking broth in sufficient quantity to cook the rice, boil, add the rice and let it cook. Retrieve the spices.
Defray the duck, wiping it of skin and bones. Cut one of the sausages in slices and the other in cubes and book.

Once cooked, spread half the rice on an oven tray. Have the shredded duck and sausage cubed and cover with the remaining rice. Decorate with the sausage slices and take them to the oven, preheated at 200°C, for about 15 to 20 minutes.

dulce-de-leche-with-banana-teleculinaria.name: Dulce De Leche With Banana
instructions: Place the condensed milk can in the pressure cooker and add water until it reaches half the height of the can. Close the pan, take it to the fire and let it boil, in medium heat, for about 30 minutes.
Desligue o lume, deixe a panela libertar todo o vapor e abra. Retire a lata e deixe arrefecer.
In a pan, in medium heat, lay 1 banana, cut into slices, and sugar, mix and let caramelize. Sprinkle with cinnamon, add orange juice and let cook for another 5 minutes, stirring always gently.
Descasque e triture as restantes bananas, juntamente com o leite condensado cozido e a raspa dos citrinos. Deixe arrefecer completamente e depois envolva as natas, previamente batidas.
Break the sticks for a serving glass, cover with the previous preparation, decorate with the caramelized banana, water with the sauce and serve.
